question: An art instructor buys tubes of paint ($5 each) and brushes ($1.5 each). If each of 8 students needs 5 tubes and 1 brush(es), how much does the instructor spend?

solution.strategy: Cost per student = tubes×price + brushes×price; multiply by students.
